section_name: Method of Sending Invoice or Notice
chapter_title: Causeways, Bridges, Tunnels, Turnpikes, Ferries, & Highways in Certain Counties
text:
As authorized under Section 322.008 (Provision of Information in Writing; Presentation of Records) (d)(2), Business & Commerce Code, a county may provide an invoice or notice required under this chapter to be sent by first class mail instead as an electronic record:

(1) if the recipient of the information agrees to the transmission of the information as an electronic record; and

(2) on terms acceptable to the recipient.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 284. Causeways, Bridges, Tunnels, Turnpikes, Ferries, & Highways in Certain Counties
##### § 284.0703 — Method of Sending Invoice or Notice

As authorized under Section 322.008 (Provision of Information in Writing; Presentation of Records) (d)(2), Business & Commerce Code, a county may provide an invoice or notice required under this chapter to be sent by first class mail instead as an electronic record:

    (1) if the recipient of the information agrees to the transmission of the information as an electronic record; and

    (2) on terms acceptable to the recipient.

*Added by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 990 (S.B.1311), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2019.*

on terms acceptable to the recipient.
